item.name: Authentication

description.content: Login and session management operations.

item.name: Log in to Informatica Intelligent Cloud Services

request.name: Log in to Informatica Intelligent Cloud Services

description.content: Authenticates a user and returns a session ID and server URL for subsequent API calls. The session ID expires after 30 minutes of inactivity.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Informatica Log Out and End the Rest Api Session

request.name: Informatica Log Out and End the Rest Api Session

description.content: Ends the current REST API session. You can also end all active sessions for the organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Connections

description.content: Manage connections to data sources and targets including databases, flat files, cloud applications, and SaaS services.

item.name: Informatica Retrieve All Connections in the Organization

request.name: Informatica Retrieve All Connections in the Organization

description.content: Returns connection details for all connections configured in the organization. Results can be filtered by agent or runtime environment.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Informatica Create a New Connection

request.name: Informatica Create a New Connection

description.content: Creates a new connection in the organization with the specified configuration including connection type, credentials, and runtime environment.

Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Jobs

description.content: Start, stop, and monitor job execution for tasks, taskflows, and other runnable assets.

item.name: Informatica Start a Job for a Task or Taskflow

request.name: Informatica Start a Job for a Task or Taskflow

description.content: Starts a job for a task identified by task ID or task name. Supports mapping tasks, synchronization tasks, data replication tasks, taskflows, and PowerCenter tasks.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Informatica Stop a Running Job

request.name: Informatica Stop a Running Job

description.content: Stops a running job. You can perform an immediate stop or a clean stop that allows the job to finish processing the current row.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Informatica Retrieve Activity Log Entries for Jobs

request.name: Informatica Retrieve Activity Log Entries for Jobs

description.content: Returns activity log entries for completed and running jobs in the organization. Results can be filtered by run ID, task ID, or other criteria.

query.description: Filter by the job run ID.
Filter by task type (e.g., MTT for mapping task, WORKFLOW for taskflow).
Filter for jobs started after this UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
Filter for jobs completed before this UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Mapping Tasks

description.content: Create, retrieve, update, and delete mapping task configurations that execute mappings with specific runtime parameters.

item.name: Informatica Retrieve All Mapping Tasks in the Organization

request.name: Informatica Retrieve All Mapping Tasks in the Organization

description.content: Returns summary information for all mapping tasks configured in the organization.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Informatica Create a New Mapping Task

request.name: Informatica Create a New Mapping Task

description.content: Creates a new mapping task in the organization. The request body must include the mapping reference, source and target connection configurations, and runtime parameters.

response.name: Mapping task created successfully.

The Informatica Intelligent Cloud Services (IICS) Platform REST API provides programmatic access to platform-level resources including authentication, connections, mappings, mapping tasks, and job management. The API supports version 2 (JSON and XML) and version 3 (JSON) resource formats. All authenticated requests require a valid session ID obtained from the login endpoint.

Contact Support:
 Name: Informatica
